notes:
Game will boot and look normal (though there is an error-message window immediately). However, it is not possible to interact in any way.

Tried disabling Esync and D3d11 and using wine D3d11.
title: Kara no Shojo

notes: Game runs fine - Tested both visual novel sections and investigation sections, as well as skip and autoread. No configuration required.
title: Kara no Shojo

notes: Trying to run it in fullscreen can result in it crashing and then refusing to launch until you restore the configuration files datasc.ksd and datasu.ksd in savedata subfolder to their previous state. Also in the clue selection UI mouse selection position often desyncs from actual mouse position and there is some input lag when clicking. It's not too hard to deal with this however and the game is playable and completable.
title: Kara no Shojo

notes: I played the entire game with all the endings and did not encounter any breaking bug but after 25 minutes or so, the framerate start to plunge witch may be immediately perceptible if your text display setting is set fast enough. Restarting the game temporary fixes the issue but it will happen again 25 minutes later. Also as mentioned by someone else, the clue selection UI is slightly out of sync with the actual mouse position and pretty laggy overall.
title: Kara no Shojo
